themes.reasoning_notes: A rate-based 3/2 for three with no text; fits low-curve combat plans better than synergy-driven shells.
Zombie typing gives incidental tribal relevance, but it has no tribe-specific text or payoff function.
Vanilla 3/2 for three contributes only as below-rate curve filler for straightforward attacking decks; no text creates stronger synergy themes.
Zombie creature type gives minimal tribal relevance, but with no Zombie-facing text it is only incidental tribe material.
